EmailTemplate.description: Email to use for leads at the sixth attempt stage.
EmailTemplate.name: Opportunity – 6th Attempt
EmailTemplate.subject: We’re closing down your quote
EmailTemplate.textOnly:
Hi {!Contact.FirstName},
As I’ve not heard back from any of my previous attempts to move forward with your business insurance, I will now be closing your quote on our system.
However, if you are interested in proceeding with a policy at any time in the future, please reply to let me know the best date and time for me to call you to set up a new quote.
Alternatively, you can always give me a ring on 01242 808 740.
Kind regards,
{!User.FirstName} Sales Team
E: salesteam@kingsbridge.co.uk T: 01242 808740
